name: laravel
description: Laravel profile: Pint + Prettier (format), Pint + ESLint (lint), Larastan/PHPStan (typecheck), Pest + Pest\Arch (test+architecture), Rector (deadcode dry-run), composer audit + npm audit, semgrep (optional). JS tooling runs only when the corresponding node_modules bin is present.

sensors.test: if php -r 'exit(extension_loaded("pcov") || extension_loaded("xdebug") ? 0 : 1);' 2>/dev/null; then XDEBUG_MODE=coverage ./vendor/bin/pest --coverage --min=70; else echo 'no coverage driver (pcov/xdebug) — running without coverage threshold' >&2; ./vendor/bin/pest; fi
sensors.policy: command -v semgrep >/dev/null && semgrep --config harness/policies/ --error || echo 'semgrep not installed (pip install semgrep) — skipping policy sensor' >&2
